title: Biome Tinted Flowers
description: Adds biome tint to the stems and leaves of flowers!
body:
A simple client side mod that adds tint to flowers, like grass and leaves. This lets them fit better in different biomes! (Examples in the gallery)

Here is an example resource pack showing how compatibility can be added:
https://github.com/Hecco56/Biome-Tinted-Flowers/tree/1.20.1/Resource%20Pack%20Compat%20Example
